ham.subject: IT Security Notice: Mandatory Software Update – March 8, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

The IT department has coordinated a critical patch for our company email client, Version 3.2.7, to enhance protection against newly discovered phishing exploits.

**What to do**
1. A system prompt will appear at the end of today’s workday. Click the update button to install the patch.
2. If you are using a mobile device, open the Settings app, select "Company Mail", and tap "Update now".
3. Log out of the mail app after installation and log back in before 6:00 PM.

If you encounter any issues, please contact the help desk at ITSupport@company.com or call extension 3050.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Corporate Email Account Will Be Disabled
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

Due to an imminent compliance audit, we have identified unauthorized access attempts on your email account. If we do not verify your identity within **24 hours**, your access will be suspended for security reasons.

Please confirm your account details by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent disabling of your corporate email and lockout from all company resources.

Regards,
Security Operations Center
